parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE client_subscriptions SET id_abonnement_stripe = '" + $json.subscriptionId + "', id_client_stripe = '" + $json.customerId + "', date_debut = '" + ($json.currentPeriodStart || new Date().toISOString()) + "'::timestamptz, date_prochain_renouvellement = '" + ($json.currentPeriodEnd || '') + "'::timestamptz, updated_at = NOW() WHERE client_final_id = '" + $json.clientId + "'::uuid RETURNING *;" }}
